en-US: The Fix screen no longer shows the web development badge.
ar: lam taud shashat Fix turez sharat wad al-tatwir ala al-web.
de-DE: Der Fix-Bildschirm zeigt das Web-Entwicklungsabzeichen nicht mehr an.
es-MX: La pantalla de Fix ya no muestra la insignia de desarrollo web.
fr-FR: L ecran Fix n affiche plus le badge de developpement web.
hi-IN: Fix screen par ab web development badge nahi dikh raha.
it-IT: La schermata Fix non mostra piu il badge di sviluppo web.
ja-JP: Fix gamen ni web kaihatsu bajji wa hyoji sa renaku narimashita.
ko-KR: Fix hwamyeon-eneun ije web gaebal baejiga pyosi doeeji anseubnida.
pt-BR: A tela Fix nao mostra mais o selo de desenvolvimento web.
ru-RU: Ekran Fix bolshe ne pokazyvaet znachok veb-razrabotki.
zh-CN: Fix jiemian buzai xianshi Web kaifa huizhang.
zh-TW: Fix huamian buzai xianshi Web kaifa huizhang.
